raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The UC Innovation and Entrepreneurship Initiative is designed to convert research and science into products that benefit society.",
    "Business incubators play a vital role in converting taxpayer-funded research into new businesses and high-paying jobs.",
    "The state will invest $2 million per year at each UC campus and the Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory to start or expand business incubators.",
    "Funding will improve entrepreneurial resources at UC campuses, including incubator space, equipment, legal services, and industry mentorship.",
    "UC-run business incubators have been a breeding ground for successful businesses and game-changing innovations.",
    "Active UC startups based in California employed over 19,000 Californians in 2014 and generated more than $14 billion in revenue.",
    "Since 1980, 843 companies have been formed by commercializing UC technology, with 84% still located in California."
  ]
}
```
